title: mapania palustris var. andamanica
intro: Mapania palustris var. andamanica, also known as the Andaman Mapania, is a plant species belonging to the family Cyperaceae. It is a type of sedge, a group of monocotyledonous plants characterized by their grass-like appearance and triangular stems. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, and has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Mapania palustris var. andamanica include decoctions and infusions, which are used to manage fever, respiratory issues, and skin problems, and to promote overall well-being.
